title: President Xi's Perspective for the Year 2050 and the Perspective of African Development
description: Chinese Academy of Social Science, Director of African Studies, Professor He Wenping's presentation to the Schiller Institute's conference, "Fulfilling the Dream of Mankind", in Bad Soden, Germany, November 25 & 26, 2017. For the full conference proceedings visit, http://newparadigm.schillerinstitute.com/fulfilling-dream-mankind/

chapters.title: In order to realize the above goal, the measures are taken in three aspects mainly
Economically: Develop Green Economy and Ecological Progress
In the World: 'One Belt. One Road' initiative
2. In the World: Peaceful Diplomacy and "One Belt & One Road" Initiative
